overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic horror game showing a female detective walking along a foggy lakeside dock toward a wooden cabin, exploring the exterior where NPCs in towels gather, then entering to investigate the dimly lit interior with a flashlight.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along wooden dock toward distant cabin visible through heavy fog

entered.detail: weathered wooden dock planks forming walkway over water
calm lake surface obscured by heavy fog
misty mountains barely visible through fog in background
small white boat anchored near the dock
tall grass reeds growing along water edge

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a weathered wooden dock extending over a foggy lake, with mountains barely visible in the mist and a small boat anchored nearby. Tall reeds line the right side as the character moves forward through the atmospheric haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: lakeside cabin exterior with sauna area

entering the dark doorway of the wooden cabin

woman in towel standing on wooden porch railing

entered.detail: rustic red wooden cabin with shingled roof
white birch trees with sparse autumn leaves
wooden picnic table with benches near cabin
white plastic outdoor chair near cabin wall
white life preserver ring mounted on cabin exterior

segments.scene_description: The character leaves the dock and approaches a rustic wooden cabin surrounded by birch trees, passing NPCs in towels gathered outside. The character walks around the exterior, passing a life preserver ring and outdoor furniture, before reaching the dark entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: dimly lit wooden cabin interior with sauna and kitchen

examining rubber duck floating in metal pot on wooden shelf
opening upper kitchen cabinet to inspect contents inside

agents.ego_description: exploring cabin interior with flashlight, examining objects and opening storage cabinets

wooden tiered benches in sauna room area
large metal pot containing water and yellow rubber duck
kitchen counter with sink and various items
wooden table with green tablecloth and bottles
coats hanging on wall hooks near doorway

segments.scene_description: Inside the dark wooden cabin, the character uses a flashlight to explore the sauna area and kitchen, discovering a rubber duck in a pot and examining cabinets while natural light filters through small windows. The interior features rustic wooden walls, a dining area, and various household items.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a desolate, foggy lakeside dock into the claustrophobic, dimly lit interior of a rustic cabin. It begins with the character walking along a weathered wooden pier over a misty lake, passing anchored boats and tall reeds while mountains loom faintly in the haze. As the character leaves the dock, the scene shifts toward a wooden cabin surrounded by birch trees, moving past NPCs in towels and outdoor furniture before approaching the dark entrance. The camera then transitions inside the cabin, where the open atmosphere of the lake is replaced by a confined space of rustic wooden walls. Finally, the view narrows as a flashlight cuts through the darkness to illuminate a sauna area and kitchen, revealing household items and a rubber duck in a pot under slivers of natural light.
